description: An operator at a gold mine manages the application of cyanide solution to a heap leach pad to dissolve the gold.

nodes.task_description: Check the solution application rate and cyanide concentration being pumped to the leach pad.

expected_outcome.expected: The operator confirms the current operating parameters are as per the plan.

nodes.task_description: Review the gold concentration in the pregnant leach solution (PLS) coming from the pad.

expected_outcome.expected: The analysis shows the gold grade in the PLS is starting to decrease.

nodes.task_description: Decide to switch the solution application to a new, fresh area of the leach pad to maintain a high gold recovery rate.

expected_outcome.expected: The operator adjusts the irrigation system to start leaching a new cell of ore.
